headline: S&P 500 at critical crossroads
detail: The market is flagging a potential breakdown in the broader index. A move lower would hit your tech-heavy, margin-amplified book hard across PLTR, AVGO, CRWD, and your ETF positions simultaneously.

headline: Fed split: Goolsbee vs. Williams on inflation
detail: Goolsbee saying inflation is too high pushes back on rate-cut timing, which is a direct headwind for high-multiple names like PLTR and CRWD. Uncertainty here keeps a lid on any sustained rally in your chip and growth names.

headline: SpaceX stock called a terrible buy
detail: A bearish take on SpaceX drops right as you hold both SPCX and SPAL. SPAL is a 2x leveraged ETF that decays over time — negative headlines plus leverage decay is a painful combo, and your stop on SPAL at $19 is very close to current price at $20.71.

headline: ON Semiconductor buys Synaptics for $7B in physical AI push
detail: Consolidation in the chip space signals continued investment in AI hardware. This is a mild positive read-through for AVGO and SMH, but doesn't change your near-term TRIM signal on AVGO given the macro backdrop.
